name: Today's Menu for the Emiya Family
original_name: 衛宮さんちの今日のごはん
overview: Fate and food meet in a delicious and gentle world. It's nothing but ordinary meal scenes... Delicious meals are served at the Emiya's dinner table every day, through spring, summer, fall and winter. -- Let's see... what's for dinner today?

trailers.title: Today’s MENU for EMIYA Family PV (English Subtitled)
